description: In the Pure for women by the dkny, the label uses recyclable packaging and the outer box uses low-VOC inks on certified forest paper. Pure DKNY opens with notes of verbena and basil, which are balanced with a floral heart of jasmine, peony and honeysuckle, while the base notes include tender white amber, sea moss and vetiver.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
